metrics.name: active_connections
metrics.description: Number of currently active client connections.
metrics.calculation: Incremented on connect, decremented on disconnect.

metrics.name: bytes_processed_total
metrics.description: Total bytes processed across all connections.
metrics.calculation: Incremented in Read/Write methods with payload length.

metrics.name: cache_hit_ratio
metrics.description: Running summary of cache hit ratio observed over the last 1m window.
metrics.calculation: Observed in Cache.Get/Set hooks with hit=1 or miss=0.

metrics.name: chained_promauto_canary_total
metrics.description: Canary for the chained promauto form; if absent, the extractor has regressed.

metrics.name: errors_total
metrics.description: Total unrecoverable errors emitted by any handler.
metrics.calculation: Incremented whenever a handler returns an error result.

metrics.name: http_request_duration_seconds
metrics.calculation: Observed in LoggingMiddleware after downstream returns.

labels.name: endpoint
labels.description: Route template of the matched endpoint

metrics.name: http_request_size_bytes
metrics.description: Distribution of inbound request payload sizes in bytes.
metrics.calculation: Observed in middleware after request body is read.

metrics.name: http_requests_total
metrics.description: Total incoming HTTP requests across all endpoints.
metrics.calculation: Incremented in LoggingMiddleware on each completed request.

labels.name: method
labels.description: HTTP method: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE

metrics.name: job_attempts_total
metrics.description: Total task attempts labelled by outcome.
metrics.calculation: Incremented in TaskRunner after each attempt resolves.

metrics.name: rpc_operation_latency_seconds
metrics.description: Per-operation latency summary across all RPC methods.
metrics.calculation: Observed in RPC middleware at response time.

labels.name: operation
labels.description: Name of the RPC method being observed

metrics.name: tasks_processed_total
metrics.description: Total number of tasks completed by the task runner.
metrics.calculation: Incremented by TaskRunner after successful task completion.

metrics.name: worker_queue_depth
metrics.description: Current number of items pending in a worker's queue.

labels.name: worker_id
labels.description: Identifier of the worker whose queue is being measured
